---
title: "Pygments Example"
filters:
  - pygments
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
  revealjs: default
---

## Example

This document contains XQuery code, which is only supported in Pygments, not in Skylighting:

```xquery
for $sp in collection($data)//sp
let $speaker = (@who, normalize-string(data(speaker)))
return <tr>
          <td>{@n}</td>
          <td>{$speaker}</td>
          <td>{count(.//l)}</td>
       </tr>
```

Inline `elements(lg)`{.xquery} should work as well.
